== Notes for [[Item:Q86214|Q86214]] ==

* from the Wikipedia page of her husband:

Nonius Asprenas married a daughter of Lucius Calpurnius Piso and they had at least one son, Lucius Nonius Asprenas, suffect consul in AD 29.[8]

=References=

* [8] Syme, Ronald, "The Augustan Aristocracy" (1986). Clarendon Press. Retrieved 2012-11-01 – via Questia (subscription required) (pg 59)

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
